Surplombant la magnifique côte de la mer de Chine méridionale, il est situé sur North Haitang Road, à quelques minutes de route du complexe de boutiques hors taxes Sanya International Duty Free City.

Ce complexe hôtelier se trouve à environ 30 minutes en voiture de la gare de Yalong Bay et à approximativement 50 minutes de route de l’aéroport international de Sanya-Phoenix.

Dotées d'un balcon, toutes les chambres offrent une vue spectaculaire sur la mer. Elles comprennent une télévision par câble, un minibar et un plateau/bouilloire.

Overlooking the stunning coast of the South China Sea, it is located on the North Haitang Road, just a few minutes drive from Sanya International Duty Free City.

The resort is about a 30-minute drive from Yalong Bay Railway Station and around a 50-minute drive from Sanya Phoenix International Airport.

Fitted with a balcony, all rooms here feature spectacular sea views and will offer a cable TV, minibar and coffee/tea maker. The en-suite bathroom comes with a bathtub and a shower. 24-hour room service is available. Some units also provide underwater views.

hotels.name: Shangri-La Shenyang

Since its magnificent debut, Shangri-La Shenyang has stood in the core area of Qingnian Avenue. Ideally positioned at the urban gold hub, the hotel neighbors high-end commercial landmarks such as Mixc and Kerry Center, with easy access to the Industrial Exhibition Hall Station (Metro Line 2) within walking distance. It offers seamless 30-minute connectivity to both Shenyang Taoxian International Airport and Shenyang North Railway Station, while placing historical treasures like the Shenyang Imperial Palace and Zhang Xueliang's Former Residence within effortless reach for a culturally immersive journey.

The hotel boasts 383 elegant guestrooms and 58 serviced apartments, starting from a generous 42 square meters to outline a refined lifestyle.

Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a sauna, garden, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a washing machine, tea and coffee maker, and free toiletries. The property provides private check-in and check-out, daily housekeeping, laundry service, and free off-site parking.

hotels.description_es:
Pillow Window & Listen to Rain Hotel Museum Branch Pingjiang Road, Suzhou es un alojamiento con una ubicación ideal en Suzhou que ofrece habitaciones con aire acondicionado y wifi gratis y parking privado gratis. Este hostal o pensión está muy bien situado en el barrio de Gusu District y dispone de jardín, además de sauna. Este alojamiento libre de humo está a 3,9 km de Jardín Liuyuan.
En el hostal o pensión, cada habitación dispone de escritorio, TV de pantalla plana, baño privado, ropa de cama y toallas. Todas las habitaciones cuentan con nevera.
Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interés como Museo de Suzhou, Beisi Pagoda y Suzhou Silk Museum. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto Internacional Sunan Shuofang) está a 38 km.
hotels.description_pt:
Com uma localização atrativa em Suzhou, Pillow Window & Listen to Rain Hotel Museum Branch Pingjiang Road, Suzhou apresenta quartos com ar condicionado, acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e estacionamento privado gratuito. Esta casa de hóspedes tem uma boa localização na área de Gusu District e dispõe de um jardim, assim como sauna. Este alojamento não fumador encontra-se a 3,9 km de Jardim Liuyuan.
No alojamento, cada quarto está equipado com secretária, televisão de ecrã plano, casa de banho privativa, roupa de cama e toalhas. Todos os quartos providenciam um frigorífico.
Pillow Window & Listen to Rain Hotel Museum Branch Pingjiang Road, Suzhou tem vários pontos de interesse populares nas suas proximidades, incluindo Museu de Suzhou, Beisi Pagoda e Suzhou Silk Museum.
hotels.description_it:
In un punto attraente di Suzhou, Pillow Window & Listen to Rain Hotel Museum Branch Pingjiang Road, Suzhou è un alloggio che propone camere climatizzate con WiFi gratuito e parcheggio privato gratuito. In un ottimo punto nel quartiere Gusu District, questo affittacamere mette a disposizione un giardino e una sauna. L'alloggio è interamente non fumatori ed è ubicato a 3,9 km da Giardino Lingering.
Presso questo affittacamere, tutte le camere sono dotate di una scrivania, una TV a schermo piatto, un bagno privato, le lenzuola e gli asciugamani. Tutte le camere presentano un frigorifero.
I luoghi di interesse più famosi nei dintorni di Pillow Window & Listen to Rain Hotel Museum Branch Pingjiang Road, Suzhou includono Museo di Suzhou, Beisi Pagoda e Suzhou Silk Museum.

hotels.name: EVEN Suzhou Grand Canal by IHG
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Suzhou, l’établissement EVEN Suzhou Grand Canal by IHG comprend une salle de sport, un salon commun, un restaurant et un bar. Cet hôtel propose un spa et centre de bien-être et est idéalement situé dans ce quartier : Huqiu District. Vous pourrez profiter d'un service d'étage, d'une réception ouverte 24h/24 et d'un service d’excursions.

Un petit-déjeuner buffet est servi sur place.

Un centre d’affaires et un service de blanchisserie sont disponibles sur place.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 4,8 km et 6,2 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Temple Hanshan et Jardin Lingering. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport international de Sunan Shuofang) est à 34 km.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: EVEN Suzhou Grand Canal by IHG in Suzhou offers comfortable rooms with modern amenities. Guests enjoy private check-in and check-out, a lounge, fitness room, and a 24-hour front desk.
Dining and Leisure: The hotel features a restaurant serving Chinese and British cuisines in a family-friendly, traditional, and modern ambience. Additional facilities include a spa and wellness centre, fitness centre, bar, and yoga classes.
Prime Location: Located 34 km from Sunan Shuofang International Airport, the hotel is near attractions such as Hanshan Temple (4.8 km) and The Lingering Garden (6 km). Yushan Lu is a 19-minute walk away. Guests appreciate the excellent breakfast and attentive staff.

hotels.name: Crowne Plaza Suzhou by IHG
hotels.description_fr:
Crowne Plaza Suzhou is ideally located in Suzhou Industrial Park, against the scenic backdrop of beautiful Jinji Lake. The luxurious hotel offers a spa, a fitness centre and free parking.

The stylish rooms of Crowne Plaza are fitted with flat-screen cable TV, a minibar and tea/coffee making facilities. Rooms are spacious and offer either lake or garden view.

Guests can take a refreshing dip at the indoor or outdoor pool, or simply relax in the sauna rooms. The hotel also offers a business centre, as well as a tour desk to assist in travel arrangements.

There are a grand total of 6 dining options at Crowne Plaza Suzhou. Sun Seeker buffet restaurant serves a variety of Chinese, Asian and International cuisines while Prince Restaurant Chinese restaurant features Cantonese delicacies.
